assessment.note: Names a specific missing condition — clear ownership boundaries so Lin is not the default escalation — which is a strong deficiency-as-request on both load and growth support.

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?
new_queue.description: Surfaces whether priorities are crisp or vague; whether they match what you thought.

new_queue.label: Ownership boundaries
new_queue.name: Where are ownership boundaries still fuzzy right now?
new_queue.description: Turns the ownership-boundaries signal into a concrete momentum probe on current work that is getting stuck.

new_queue.label: Next two weeks
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks lighter for you?
new_queue.description: Closes by steering toward practical changes that reduce load without introducing new topics.
